title: wedelia zuliana
intro: Wedelia zuliana, also known as Wedelia or Florida Beauty, is a perennial flowering plant native to tropical America, characterized by its bright yellow and orange flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Wedelia zuliana include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Wedelia zuliana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
